class.name: BlaziumGoapActionPlanner
class.brief_description: An internal backend node generating A* paths mapping GoapActions towards GoapGoals.
class.description: [BlaziumGoapActionPlanner] is the primary logical processing engine used internally by [BlaziumGoapAgent]. It compiles a list of available actions and executes an AStar backward search resolving the sequence (the "Plan") that successfully transforms the current [BlaziumGoapWorldState] into the Goal's desired state requirements, choosing the shortest and cheapest cost structure. [br]This node operates completely autonomously beneath the Agent.

method.name: get_plan
method.description: Generates and returns an array of [BlaziumGoapAction] instances representing the most cost-effective path to satisfy the given [param goal], starting from the provided [param blackboard] state natively. Returns an empty array if no path is found.

method.name: set_actions
method.description: Sets the pool of actions the planner is allowed to use during the A* graph traversal.
